action_contract: Observed PEEP in the action window; missing remains missing and is never class zero; continuous-clipped versus preregistered train-quantile five-bin encoding is selected on validation only.
anchor_contract: First qualifying structured respiratory-support event with observed ventilator settings inside the ICU; no ICU-start or diagnosis-only fallback and no exact invasive-onset relabeling.
claim_boundary: Recorded-trajectory forecasting and benchmark-validity auditing only. Treatment, causal, counterfactual, policy-selection, clinical-utility, deployment, and autonomous-decision claims are blocked.
state_interval: Fully contained pre-action four-hour history bins ending before t; current PEEP and FiO2 are excluded from state.
target_interval: Observed physiology values, masks, and recencies in [t+4h,t+8h).
